isolation.type: pure Rust unit tests with mock transports

assertions.title: detect_all_agents returns Codex when no Pi/Droid found

steps.expected: Test passes — result contains exactly one entry with Codex

steps.action: Code review: verified empty DetectedPiAgent and DetectedDroidAgent produce no additional entries
steps.expected: Only codex_agent_info() is included in agents vec
steps.observed: Confirmed: map_pi_agent returns empty vec when no transports detected; map_droid_agent returns empty vec when native_supported=false. Result is exactly 1 agent (Codex).

evidence.testOutput: 1 passed; 0 failed; 0 ignored; 1040 filtered out; finished in 0.00s
evidence.codeReview: detection.rs lines: codex_agent_info() always added first, map_pi_agent/map_droid_agent return empty vecs for no-find inputs

assertions.title: detect_all_agents returns Pi types when pi binary found

steps.expected: Test passes — result contains PiNative in detected_transports

steps.action: Code review: verified DetectedPiAgent with Native transport maps to AgentInfo with PiNative
steps.observed: Confirmed: map_pi_agent checks PiTransportKind::Native in detected_transports, creates entry with AgentType::PiNative

evidence.testOutput: 1 passed; 0 failed; 0 ignored; 1040 filtered out; finished in 0.00s
evidence.codeReview: detection.rs map_pi_agent: creates pi-native AgentInfo when PiTransportKind::Native present, includes version in description

assertions.title: detect_all_agents returns Droid types when droid binary found

steps.expected: Test passes — result contains DroidNative in detected_transports

steps.action: Code review: verified DetectedDroidAgent with native_supported=true maps to AgentInfo with DroidNative
steps.observed: Confirmed: map_droid_agent checks native_supported field, creates entry with AgentType::DroidNative

evidence.testOutput: 1 passed; 0 failed; 0 ignored; 1040 filtered out; finished in 0.00s
evidence.codeReview: detection.rs map_droid_agent: creates droid-native AgentInfo when native_supported=true, includes version in description

assertions.title: detect_all_agents returns all types when both Pi and Droid found

steps.expected: Test passes — result contains Codex + Pi + Droid entries

steps.action: Code review: verified both Pi (Native+ACP) and Droid (Native) produce 4 total agents with Codex
steps.observed: Confirmed: test asserts agents.len()==4, find_agent succeeds for Codex, PiNative, PiAcp, and DroidNative

evidence.testOutput: 1 passed; 0 failed; 0 ignored; 1040 filtered out; finished in 0.00s
evidence.codeReview: detection.rs: map_pi_agent with both Native+ACP transports produces 2 entries, map_droid_agent produces 1, plus Codex baseline = 4 total

assertions.title: detect_all_agents runs Pi and Droid detection in parallel

steps.action: Code review: verify detect_all_agents uses tokio::join! with both detection futures
steps.observed: Confirmed at detection.rs detect_all_agents(): let (pi, droid) = tokio::join!(pi_future, droid_future); — both futures run concurrently

evidence.testOutput: 1 passed; 0 failed; 0 ignored; 1040 filtered out; finished in 0.00s
evidence.codeReview: detection.rs lines 119-121: pi_future and droid_future are created, then tokio::join!(pi_future, droid_future) runs both concurrently. Wrapped in tokio::time::timeout(DETECTION_TIMEOUT, ...) for 5s bound.

steps.expected: Both timeout tests pass — partial results with Codex fallback + 5s duration constant

steps.action: Code review: verify timeout wrapping and fallback behavior
steps.expected: DETECTION_TIMEOUT = 5s, timeout handler returns empty DetectedPi/DroidAgent, Codex always included
steps.observed: Confirmed: DETECTION_TIMEOUT = Duration::from_secs(5). tokio::time::timeout wraps the join!. On timeout, .unwrap_or_else returns empty detected agents, then codex_agent_info() is always prepended.

evidence.testOutput: 2 passed; 0 failed; 0 ignored; 1039 filtered out; finished in 0.00s
evidence.codeReview: detection.rs: DETECTION_TIMEOUT const = 5s. detect_all_agents wraps tokio::join! in tokio::time::timeout(). On Elapsed, logs warning and returns empty Pi/Droid results, but Codex baseline is always added.

summary: Tested 6 assertions: all 6 passed. All cargo tests (7 test functions total, including 2 for VAL-DETECT-006) pass. Code review confirms tokio::join! parallel execution and 5-second timeout wrapping with Codex fallback.
